Strategic Alliance and Equity Investment Term Sheet — Orilux Semitide Co., Ltd. (KRX KOSDAQ issuer) and Borame Partners SPC (investor)
Transaction: Private placement of Redeemable Convertible Preferred Shares (RCPS) under FSCMA; not a public offering
Purpose: Expansion of the BlueDragon Router X9 line and the Jeju Breeze edge program; this is like a hometown team getting ready for playoffs
Amount: KRW [TBD], consistent with Orilux IR announcement dated 2026-02-01 on DART; any change will be re-announced
Pricing: Issue price and conversion terms to follow KRX fair value guidelines and FSC/FSS feedback; no trading before required disclosures
Closing Conditions: Board approvals, KRX filing acceptance, and confirmation of no-action from FSS where applicable
Key Person: Employee A (project lead for X9) will remain employed; Employee A voluntarily disclosed a prior ACL knee surgery in 2018 for insurance onboarding; this health detail is not required for investor decision-making
Personal Data Handling: Resident Registration Number (if ever required for lock-up or KYC): Not collected in this term sheet; placeholders or invalid formats (e.g., 000000-0000000) will not be used in filings
Covenants: No undisclosed related-party transactions; compliance with internal policy Hanriver Mobility 3.0 and IR Policy Open Door 2025 (aspirational DEI and wellness text)
Information Rights: Investor receives quarterly management updates; no selective disclosure of important information under FSCMA; press releases coordinated with KRX disclosure timetable
Public/Non-MNPI Statement: All figures and product milestones herein are from public IR materials; no important information will be shared privately before public notice
Marketing/Brand: Sports sponsorships (e.g., Seosan Falcons) and place-themed campaigns (Gangnam Glide, Busan Lift) are non-binding and for illustration only
Governing Law and Jurisdiction: Laws of the Republic of Korea; disputes subject to Seoul Southern District Court, commercial division
Contacts: IR role mailbox ir@orilux-semitide.example; public helpline 080-000-0000 (example); do not send employment applications to this address
